mapper.select: SELECT si.sample_id AS sampleNo, si.old_sample_num AS oldSampleNum, si.product_no AS productNo, si.sample_type AS sampleType, si.hospital_name AS hospitalName, si.department_name AS departmentName, si.doctor_name AS doctorName, si.clinic_num AS clinicNum, si.is_save_pedigree AS isSavePedigree, si.proband_sample AS probandSample, si.client_relation AS clientRelation, pi.name AS patientName, CASE WHEN pi.sex = '男' THEN 1 WHEN pi.sex = '女' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END AS patientGender, CAST(sei.patient_age AS Char) AS patientAge, pi.identity AS patientIdCard, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(si.collect_date) * 1000 AS collectDate, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(si.received_date) * 1000 AS receivedDate, pi.phone AS patientMobile, si.client_type AS clientType, si.detect_reason AS detectReason, si.clinical_diagnosis AS clinicalDiagnosis, si.detect_clinical_diagnosis AS detectClinicalDiagnosis, sei.bh_gravidity AS gestationalTimes, sei.bh_parity AS childbirthTimes, CAST(sei.bh_other AS SIGNED) AS abortionTimes, CONCAT_WS(',', sei.gestational_weeks, sei.gestational_days) AS gestationalWeeks, CAST(sei.tubebaby_type AS SIGNED) AS borrowOvumFlag, sei.last_menstrual_period AS lastMenstrualPeriodDate, sei.fetus_test_flag AS fetusTestFlag, CAST(sei.us_check AS SIGNED) AS ultrasonicFlag, sei.ultrasound_test_date AS ultrasoundTestDate, CAST(sei.us_check AS SIGNED) AS ultrasonicAbnormalFlag, sei.male_detect_flag AS maleDetectFlag, sei.detect_method_male AS detectMethodMale, sei.detect_result_male AS detectResultMale, sei.female_detect_flag AS femaleDetectFlag, sei.detect_method_female AS detectMethodFemale, sei.detect_result_female AS detectResultFemale, sei.child_detect_flag AS childDetectFlag, sei.detect_method_child AS detectMethodChild, sei.detect_result_child AS detectResultChild, sei.illness_history_genetic_flag AS illnessHistoryGeneticFlag, sei.illness_history_genetic AS illnessHistoryGenetic, sei.patient_remark AS remark, sei.illness_history_past_male AS illnessHistoryPastMale, sei.illness_history_past_female AS illnessHistoryPastFemale FROM t_lis_sample si LEFT JOIN t_mchi_patient pi ON si.patient_oid = pi.oid LEFT JOIN t_lis_examination sei ON si.oid = sei.sample_oid WHERE si.old_sample_num = #{oldSampleNum}
